text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since I started my job at Tracen Academy as a
trainer. While I should be at work right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My body's crying out in pain, so after a quick call, I'm on my way to
the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to the doctor, it's nothing more than food poisoning.
Relieved to hear it's nothing serious, I grab the medicine prescribed
to me and head home.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Well... Congratulations on being discharged, Mejiro Ardan. Just make
sure you don't overdo it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're sick of hearing this by now, but moderation is key!
Always do your stretches before exercising, and be sure to ice your
legs after.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
The more fractures or sprains you accumulate, the worse off your legs
will be in the long run. Above all else, be mindful of your condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Understood, doctor. As always, thank you for your thorough
treatment.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Miss Ardan, your chauffeur awaits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. So soon? Thank you for informing me. Now then... I shall be
off. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text: Goodbye! Be careful out there! I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch this strangely somber scene between the hospital staff and
their patient, I notice the Tracen uniform and recognize Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next time I see her is when I get off the bus and arrive at Tracen
Academy. That's when I notice a very worried Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm... Ah! Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Chiyono O. I see you waited for me to get back this time
as well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! Why wouldn't I? You're finally out of the hospital and
can come to school again! Congratulations, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Still, I feel terrible for making you wait out in the cold... I'd hate to
see you get sick just as I'm getting better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When we return to the dorms, allow me to brew us both a cup of tea. I
received quite the selection as get-well presents.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, did she get hospitalized again?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, now that you mention it, I do remember hearing that she couldn't
run in the tryouts due to an injury or illness.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
But she's race-ready, right? I'd be more worried about debuting if I
were her... I mean, how many times does this make?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you there! How dare you—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O. I appreciate your concern, but I assure you, I do not mind
the gossip about me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: After all, they're not wrong.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let us make our way back to the dorms before we both
catch a cold.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, you want to know more about Mejiro Ardan? Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my curiosity piqued, I've come to Tazuna to learn more about
Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you've heard, she's very prone to illness and injury. She's
been in and out of the hospital since she started here.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And because of that, she's had to pull out of tryouts and practice very
frequently.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, that means she hasn't been scouted, so she hasn't made her
debut. As for the trainers' opinion of her... They aren't exactly
favorable.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I... think she has potential. She is a Mejiro, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But unfortunately, her body is so fragile. And then there's the matter
of her older sister.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You're a new trainer, but I'm sure you've heard of her. She's the pride
of the Mejiro family—Mejiro Ramonu.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
She won her debut by a whole twenty lengths. During her Junior
division years, she was already reaching speeds that rivaled the "Hot
Rod" Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And to top it all off, she's the very first Triple Tiara winner.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I could be here all day telling you what makes Ramonu shine so
bright, but... I think the strength of that light also obscures Ardan's,
relegating her to the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I know Ardan is doing her absolute best...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
However, she's running out of chances to debut. Her next race may be her last
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies. I have my own speculations as to Ardan's future,
but, well...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: If you're that interested, perhaps it'd be best to talk to Ardan herself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My talk with Tazuna only deepens my curiosity. It must be hard to live
in your sister's shadow as the feeble sibling, yet all I can picture is
Ardan's gentle smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... I'll go check up on her myself tomorrow.
